case_title: SERVELINA CONDE VS. MAYOR'S OFFICE OF HOUSING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,155.00 FILED BY CONDE, SERVELINA AS TO DEFENDANT MAYOR'S OFFICE OF HOUSING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOHN--INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MAYOR'S OFFICE OF HOUSING
